title: Companion — The Ghost Designer
medium: eight objects paired with the statutes that actually shaped them. the kei-van and the shako shomeisho; the Danish chair and a postwar ceiling height; the pint glass and a 1824 excise law; the Instagram square and Kodak's 127 roll.
caption: What looks like a design language is usually a paragraph of code nobody in the studio has read. Constraint as a species of ghost-designer — shaping without signing.
